FX.title: [USD/JPY] DOWN: AI Detects Bearish Pressure as BOJ Intervention Risks and US Labor Weakness Converge
tldr_points: BOJ re-enters yen market, signaling potential sustained intervention support
US April job cuts surge 38% YoY, undermining dollar strength thesis
IMF warning on Japan intervention adds geopolitical constraint to JPY bears
FX.excerpt: USD/JPY Bearish: BOJ intervention return and US labor data weakness create downward pressure
FX.comment: Bearish setup driven by BOJ intervention return and US labor weakness; target breakdown through 148.50 support
